tags: Scores higher when a larger share of the target pubkey's inbound followers are distance-1 pubkeys from the root graph.
content:
plan
  histogram = do 'graph.degree_histogram' {pubkey: _.targetPubkey}
in
let
  h = histogram | {},
  inbound = fetch(h, .inDistanceHistogram) | {},
  inner = fetch(inbound, .1) | 0,
  total = fetch(h, .inDegree) | 0,
  ratio = if total > 0 then inner / total else 0,
  countScore = if inner <= 0 then 0.0
    else if inner == 1 then 0.35
    else if inner <= 3 then 0.55
    else if inner <= 7 then 0.75
    else 0.9,
  ratioBonus = if ratio < 0.05 then 0.0
    else if ratio < 0.15 then 0.05
    else if ratio < 0.3 then 0.1
    else if ratio < 0.5 then 0.15
    else 0.2,
  confidence = if total <= 0 then 0.0
    else if total == 1 then 0.7
    else if total <= 3 then 0.85
    else 1.0,
  score = confidence * (countScore + ratioBonus)
in
if score > 1.0 then 1.0 else score
